description: Recto (original use): Legal document describing a gathering to assess a bride's dowry. Fragment (right side only). Location: al-Maḥalla al-Kubrā. Probably in the hand of Moshe b. Peraḥya, the muqaddam of al-Maḥalla. Dating: the date is missing, but probably written under the authority of David Maimonides (l. 3), in which case this would date to after 1238 CE. AA
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
